title: Getting Better
description: Exploring personal growth and relationship struggles.
lyrics: When we're gonna get it, that I lost me And I'll find it as I'm losing you Ain't that a bitch right, ay? You're gonna find out when you lose you Inside a moment with another person Relationships thriving You can't find a moment to make yourself happy You know that it's something for me and it's something for them And now we're just sitting there, toxic again When am I gonna learn, ay? When am I gonna learn that I lose me? Helping you, when are you gonna learn that you lose you? Standing there, stand for it, stand for it Jump for something, find your own path Don't just sit there all night, night, night Next level, here we go I'm losing you, but I'm finding me I'm losing you, but I'm finding me I've been gone in my own mind for so long Thinking how I got wrong, right How I was right, how I got wrong My own life, there's no way That you can see that if you're still alive And dreaming, baby, so I lost me, I lost you, and now I think I'm gonna find me again Huh, am I gonna know it right? Am I gonna know it? When I see myself again Losing you, making me find me Losing you, making me drive me To new places and grow I love how it all just beads away You can take pain, you can take the hard way Or you can take the right way, which is just the Harder way, it just doesn't make sense to me It's all beautiful, flower in your mind, you let it grow Don't lose your own source of inspiration, let it go Huh, do I know any better? I don't think so, I'm just Finding me again, after losing you Huh, you know it better? I can tell you why that I'm Finding me, finding you, yeah I'm finding me, finding my light Isn't any better? When I'm saying that I'm sorry for my stupidness I'm sorry for the reasons that I've come and seen Man, I want you to find a different season Of love, for yourself Cause, when I lost you I found me sitting right underneath All the oppression And all of the anger For the things you didn't want Yet you punished me for Oh, like I said When you left me, you found me And that's the end of our story
